meta.title: Zambia CDC 2024 Biology Syllabus — Structured RAG Dataset
meta.source: Ministry of Education, Curriculum Development Centre — BIOLOGY-SYLABUS-O-LEVEL-FORM-1-4.pdf
meta.purpose: Structured curriculum data for AI-assisted quiz, lesson plan, and assessment generation. Each record maps to one embeddable chunk aligned to official CDC competences.
meta.subject: Biology
meta.extractionNote: Shift-corrected extract (detected_shift=29, confidence=0.781) + deterministic CDC table parse. No fabricated content.
